caption: In a lecture hall setting, several people are gathered around a long table serving food. A man in a black shirt and khaki pants stands by the table, while another person in a black shirt and a woman in a black sleeveless top are also positioned behind the table. A man wearing a purple polo shirt and khaki pants walks away from the table toward the right side of the room. In the foreground, several attendees sit in rows of chairs; one person wears a yellow shirt, and another wears a black t-shirt featuring a white logo of a stylized animal head. A large projection screen is visible in the background, though the text on it is not clearly legible. As the scene progresses, the man in the purple shirt continues moving right and exits the frame, while the woman in the black sleeveless top moves further right.
